# Rostra

Rostra is a p2p (or rather f2f) social network.

# Check it on Radicle

This project is primarily hosted on Radicle. Check-out [Rostra on Radicle](https://app.radicle.xyz/nodes/radicle.dpc.pw/rad:zzK566qFsZnXomX2juRjxj9K1LuF) for an up to date version.

Continue to [the original Rostra README.md](../README.md).
